creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: nivit
Date: Thu May 23 19:40:08 2013
New Revision: 318899
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318899

Log:
  - Repocopy databases/py-sqlalchemy to databases/py-sqlalchemy-devel
  - Update the repocopied port to 0.8.1  [1]
  - Re-order OPTIONS conditionals  [1]
  - Make BUILD_DEPENDS use TEST_DEPENDS when TESTS option is true  [1]
  
  PR:	ports/178498  [1]
  Submitted by:	koobs

Added:
  head/databases/py-sqlalchemy-devel/
     - copied from r318898, head/databases/py-sqlalchemy/
Modified:
  head/databases/Makefile
  head/databases/py-sqlalchemy-devel/Makefile
  head/databases/py-sqlalchemy-devel/distinfo
  head/databases/py-sqlalchemy-devel/pkg-plist

Modified: head/databases/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/Makefile	Thu May 23 19:16:48 2013	(r318898)
+++ head/databases/Makefile	Thu May 23 19:40:08 2013	(r318899)
@@ -756,6 +756,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-simplecouchdb
     SUBDIR += py-south
     SUBDIR += py-sqlalchemy
+    SUBDIR += py-sqlalchemy-devel
     SUBDIR += py-sqlalchemy06
     SUBDIR += py-sqlite3
     SUBDIR += py-sqlite3dbm

Modified: head/databases/py-sqlalchemy-devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/py-sqlalchemy/Makefile	Thu May 23 19:16:48 2013	(r318898)
+++ head/databases/py-sqlalchemy-devel/Makefile	Thu May 23 19:40:08 2013	(r318899)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	sqlalchemy
-PORTVERSION=	0.7.10
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.1
 CATEGORIES=	databases python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -13,6 +13,8 @@ COMMENT=	A Python SQL toolkit and Object
 
 LICENSE=	MIT
 
+LATEST_LINK=	${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}-devel
+
 TEST_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS} \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}nose>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-nose
 
@@ -67,10 +69,6 @@ RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}MyS
 .endif
 .endif
 
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MTESTS}
-BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}nose>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-nose
-.endif
-
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPGSQL}
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}psycopg2>=2.0.8:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-psycopg2
 .endif
@@ -83,6 +81,10 @@ RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}sql
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/Sybase.py:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sybase
 .endif
 
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MTESTS}
+BUILD_DEPENDS:=		${TEST_DEPENDS}
+.endif
+
 post-install:
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
